howItWorks.h2: Four steps from damaged to done.

steps.title: Free Inspection
steps.desc: A certified inspector examines your roof at no charge and gives you an honest assessment.

steps.title: We Handle Your Claim
steps.desc: Our team navigates the insurance process, so you don't have to fight the paperwork alone.

steps.title: Installation Day
steps.desc: Our crew arrives on time, completes the job in a single day, and leaves your property spotless.

steps.title: Lifetime Guarantee
steps.desc: Your new roof is backed by a lifetime workmanship warranty plus manufacturer product warranties.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: After a hailstorm hit our neighborhood, Assurance was out the next morning. They handled the insurance claim entirely and the crew finished our full replacement in just 2 days. Couldn't be happier with the results.

reviews.name: James & Lisa T.
reviews.text: Their inspector was incredibly thorough. He found damage that two other companies completely missed. They went to bat for us with our insurance company and we got a full replacement covered.

reviews.name: Marcus R.
reviews.text: I called on Tuesday after noticing a leak. By Thursday morning their crew was on my roof. Fast, professional, and the price was exactly what they quoted — no surprises.

serviceOptions: Not Sure — I Need an Assessment

items.q: How long does a full roof replacement take?
items.a: Most full replacements are completed in a single day. Larger or more complex roofs may take two days. We'll give you an accurate timeline during your free inspection.

items.q: Will my homeowners insurance cover the damage?
items.a: Storm, wind, and hail damage is typically covered by homeowners insurance. We have extensive experience working with insurance companies and can assist you throughout the claims process to ensure you receive the maximum settlement.

items.q: What roofing brands do you install?
items.a: We are certified installers for GAF, Owens Corning, and CertainTeed — three of the most trusted names in the industry. This certification means you get full manufacturer warranties in addition to our own lifetime workmanship guarantee.

items.q: How do I know if I need a repair or a full replacement?
items.a: Our free inspection will determine exactly what's needed. Factors like the age of the roof, the extent of damage, and the remaining life expectancy all inform that decision. We'll never recommend a replacement if a repair is the right call.
Yes. We hold NC License #NC-67492 and carry full general liability insurance and workers' compensation coverage. We're happy to provide certificates of insurance upon request.

We serve the greater Charlotte metro area including Ballantyne, Myers Park, Dilworth, NoDa, Huntersville, Cornelius, Concord, Mooresville, and Gastonia. Not sure if we cover your area? Give us a call.

cta.h2: Don't wait for a small leak to become a disaster.
cta.subtext: Get your free inspection today. No obligation, no pressure — just an honest assessment from Charlotte's most trusted roofing team.

footer.tagline: Charlotte's most trusted roofing contractor. Premium materials, expert craftsmanship, lifetime guarantee.
